calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-17-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an Adult and Two Minors.
Dept. 218, VJ: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maureen Howard.
Petitioner: Alex Peng Hugh, present in pro per and self and as guardian ad litem for the Minors: Jacky Peng Hugh and David Peng Hugh.
Co-Petitioner/Minor Mother: Judy Fen Li, also present in pro per as guardian ad litme for the two minors, and with Cantonese Interpreter: Wei Zhe Chen.
Petitioners and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Alex Peng and grants the name change of the minors to: Jacky Peng and David Peng.
Decree signed in open court.
